title: Fogbox
body:
Improved Fog turns into the Skybox!

Fogbox is simple, instead of using a fog color, Fogbox replaces the fog with what the skybox is! End islands no longer have outlines on the islands, fog doesnt look so out of place anymore!

Contact and Discord:

If you wanna get in contact with me, just head over to my Discord server and we can chat there!

This mod DOES NOT work with Iris, Sodium, Optifine/Optifabric, Canvas, or any other rendering mods.
